prestazioni: M54B30 (3.0L I6) engine: Full forged internals by Mahle (pistons, 86.5mm bore, 89.6mm stroke) with Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, ARP L19 head studs, and a custom Schrick 264°/256° camshaft grind for 7,500 RPM redline. Paired with a Garrett GT3582R turbo (0.82 A/R, 62mm inducer) on a custom tubular manifold by TurboLab, feeding a Spearco 4.5" intercooler with 1,200 CFM core. Fueling via Siemens DEKA 80lb/hr injectors, Walbro 450 LPH pump, and a custom AEM EMS-4 standalone ECU with flex-fuel capability. Exhaust system: 3.5" stainless steel downpipe with a Vibrant 1799 resonator and MagnaFlow 3.5" cat-back, terminating in 4.5" rolled tips.

Drivetrain: ZF 5HP24 5-speed automatic transmission reinforced with a Level 10 torque converter (3,000 stall) and a Quaife ATB differential (3.91 final drive). Custom 1-piece aluminum driveshaft by Driveshaft Shop with CV joints rated for 800 lb-ft torque. Clutch-type limited-slip differential in the transfer case with 60% lockup for off-road capability.

Suspension: KW Variant 3 coilovers (adjustable compression/rebound, 80mm-120mm ride height range) with custom-valved Eibach springs (25% stiffer than OEM) and spherical bearing top mounts by 034 Motorsport. Front sway bar upgraded to a 28mm adjustable unit by Hotchkis, rear sway bar to 22mm. Polyurethane bushings throughout (subframe, control arms, trailing arms) by Vibratechnics. Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers (380mm rotors) and 4-piston rear calipers (355mm rotors) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and stainless steel braided lines.
estetica: Widebody conversion using a custom Rocket Bunny E53 kit (flares extended 2.5" per side, carbon fiber fenders, and a 3-piece front bumper with integrated tow hooks). Rear diffuser by Vorsteiner (carbon fiber, 3-piece design) with integrated quad-exit exhaust cutouts. Custom carbon fiber hood by Seibon with a 2.5" cowl scoop and heat extractor vents.

OEM+ aggressive styling: G-Power E53 front lip spoiler (carbon fiber), AC Schnitzer roof spoiler (aluminum, 3-piece), and a custom rear wing by 996 Motorsports (dual-element, 60" span, adjustable angle). Wheels: BBS LM-R II (9.5x19 ET25 front, 10.5x19 ET20 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear). Fender badges replaced with custom engraved titanium units ("M54B30TT" on left, "E53 X5" on right).

Interior: Full Alcantara retrim by Euro Auto Top (headliner, A-pillars, door cards, center console) in BMW Individual Anthracite. Custom Recaro SPG XL seats (carbon fiber backs, 6-point harnesses) with Schroth Profi II-6 belts. M50B25TU (E36 M3) steering wheel (380mm, Alcantara, M-embossed) with a quick-release hub by NRG. Custom gauge cluster by Defi (turbo boost, oil temp, fuel pressure, wideband AFR) mounted in the center console. Roll cage by Custom Cages (8-point, TIG-welded, 4130 chromoly) with integrated harness bar.
